episodes.title: Escaping the Witness Cult-ure Via Applied Freewill
episodes.description:
Teri describes her escape from the Jehovah's Witness Cult after 30 long years of indoctrination. 
Hope to see you all over at https://www.crrow777radio.com/

LISTEN TO THE  FULL SHOW - EPISODE 685 - POSTED FOR MEMBERS:
